title: Golden Pan
description: Find treasure by panning through sand, gravel, and more!
body:
🥘 Golden Pan – Minecraft Mod
🔧 Description

Golden Pan is a small but useful mod that adds a wooden pan to Minecraft – a simple craftable item that can be used for custom recipes or gameplay expansion in your modpack.

🛠️ Crafting Recipe

You can craft the Wooden Pan using 5 oak wooden planks in this shape:
✅ Works with oak wooden plank.

✅ Compatibility

Minecraft 1.20.1

Fabric Mod Loader

Lightweight and modpack-friendly

💡 Use Cases

This item is ideal as a base for:

Gold panning mechanics 💰

Custom systems in survival or tech mods

Entry-level crafting components

👤 Created by HrajtoStudio

Feel free to fork the mod, suggest new features, or include it in your own modpack. 💖
Have fun and keep crafting!
